# docs/templates/

Reusable instructor templates referenced by this project — primarily the spec template (Stage 4) and the prompt-log template (Stages 4–5). These templates originate in the course repository (`adamwstauffer/shidler`) and are fetched from there at authoring time; this directory holds local copies or pointers when a stage requires them. Files retain their upstream template names rather than the dated `YYYY-MM-DD-pham-apple-{kind}` convention, since they are not student-authored artifacts. This directory supports Stages 1 and 4. See `docs/specs/` for the populated specification produced from the spec template.
